bundle.title: Narrative Heavy — Relecloud Feature Optimization Story

evidence.snippet: Heard from someone at a conference that Relecloud might be interested in experimentation. Forwarding for awareness.

notes: Relecloud is reportedly transforming their entire product development process around experimentation
Multiple internal discussions about Relecloud's experimentation maturity
Their VP of Engineering spoke at a conference about data-driven feature optimization
Team believes this could be a flagship account for experimentation adoption
Internal champion identified but not confirmed
Experimentation could fundamentally change how they build products

human_summary: Relecloud has potential experimentation interest but only one weak evidence item supports it
Strong internal narrative not backed by direct customer evidence

because.claim: Single email forward from conference hearsay is the only evidence

assumptions: Internal narrative about Relecloud may reflect real interest
open_questions: Has anyone had a direct conversation with Relecloud about experimentation?
Is the conference talk evidence or just general industry content?

eic.summary_why_it_matters: Strong internal narrative but only one weak third-hand evidence item. Requires direct customer validation.

expected.notes: Tests whether agent resists inflating classification based on narrative weight vs actual evidence quality.
